title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda uses AI tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team analyzed 15,000 potential binding sites and narrowed them to 15 viable targets, conducting research on minimal computational infrastructure while collaborating with local hospitals.
